title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sanofi India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sanofi India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!
